title: Correlation Context
description: Cross-cutting correlation context used for distributed tracing across the Pulse event pipeline. Every pipeline run shares a correlationId so downstream consumers can reconstruct the full event flow. See EVENT_ARCHITECTURE.md §4.

correlationId.description: Pipeline or workflow tracing ID. All events in a single track processing run share this value. Typically the trackId or a dedicated pipeline UUID.

traceId.description: Optional distributed tracing ID compatible with OpenTelemetry W3C Trace Context.

spanId.description: Optional span identifier within the trace, representing a single operation.
